title: Memory search Clusters 4-7 remediation
description: Close 13 P1/P2 defects from phase 005's audit covering causal-stats output hygiene (Cluster 4), state hygiene (Cluster 5), folder discovery + channel health (Cluster 6), and quality fallback + edge growth (Cluster 7). Surface CocoIndex daemon health on memory_health. Promote informal 20-paraphrase intent-classifier stability test to a formal corpus.
